case_title: HELEN RABIN VS. BANK OF THE WEST

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2016 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,516.80 FILED BY RABIN, HELEN AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-17-2016 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PARTIES TO NOV. 04, 2016 AT 1:30PM (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RABIN, HELEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,000.00, PLAINTIFF SUFFERED SIGNIFICANT INCONVENIENCE AND EMOTIONAL DISTRESS RELATED TO DEFENDANT'S ERROR THROUGH NO FAULT OF THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-01-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-17-2016 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO NOV-04-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF HELEN RABIN WITH ASSISTANCE FROM INNA KUPRIYANOVA SWORN BY CLERK TO TRANSLATE THE RUSSIAN LANGUAGE. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST REPRESENTATIVE HAZIM ELBGAL. THIS CASE TO BE HEARD WITH CSM-16-853241. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BANK OF THE WEST

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-04-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-04-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY HAZIM ELBGAL, BRANCH MANAGER. IFP GRANTED-NO COSTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
